task.title: Create Relayfile product page in relay Next.js app

events.content: Build Relayfile as a dedicated marketing page under /app/file using the existing landing-page layout and brand tokens: Build Relayfile as a dedicated marketing page under /app/file using the existing landing-page layout and brand tokens

raw.question: Build Relayfile as a dedicated marketing page under /app/file using the existing landing-page layout and brand tokens
raw.chosen: Build Relayfile as a dedicated marketing page under /app/file using the existing landing-page layout and brand tokens
raw.reasoning: This preserves consistency with the rest of the site while allowing file-specific sections and visuals without touching the home page.

retrospective.summary: Created /app/file Relayfile product page with server metadata wrapper, client content component, custom landing-style stylesheet, and verified it with a successful next build.
